arts.sum: Lloyd Kelly joined Juventus from Newcastle United on transfer deadline day. The Englishman had arrived at St James’ Park in the summer transfer window on a free transfer and the Magpies will make a profit from his sale in the summer of 2025, as Juventus have an obligation to buy Kelly. arts.sum: Newcastle United and Arsenal both face major team selection decisions ahead of tonight's huge Carabao Cup clash at St James' Park. That means, when looking at the official Arsenal website, the Gunners have 17 senior players available for selection for the game vs Newcastle.
